summary: Completed testing of OrthoConnect new features: Resend OTP with 30s countdown, Change number link, and Profile photo upload. All features working correctly except one frontend bug - photo upload remains disabled after profile submission.

ui_bugs.issue: After profile submission, profileExists state is not updated to true, causing ProfilePhotoBlock to remain disabled even after successful profile creation
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Add setProfileExists(true) after successful profile submission in submitProfile() function, or call loadExistingProfile() to refresh state

passed_tests: Resend OTP button appears after requesting OTP with 30s countdown
Resend button is disabled during countdown (shows 'Resend in Xs')
Resend button enables after countdown reaches 0 (shows 'Resend OTP')
Clicking Resend OTP restarts the 30s countdown
Change number link visible in verify step
Change number link resets OTP flow to initial state (hides OTP input, shows Send OTP button)
OTP sent via real SMS (2Factor.in) for valid Indian numbers
Mocked OTP returned for invalid numbers (development mode)
Photo upload returns 200 OK with photo_visibility: admin_only
AgileOrtho branding present in header and footer
Subspecialty limit (max 2) still enforced in backend
action_items: FIX: In /app/frontend/src/pages/JoinSurgeon.jsx, add setProfileExists(true) after successful profile submission in submitProfile() function (around line 216) to enable photo upload
critical_code_review_comments: JoinSurgeon.jsx line 216: After setStatus('pending'), should also call setProfileExists(true) or loadExistingProfile() to enable photo upload block

success_rate.backend: 100% (7/8 tests passed - 1 test expected failure due to existing profile)
success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features work except photo upload state not updating after profile submission)

seed_data_creation: Test surgeon profiles created during photo upload testing

features_verified.resend_otp_button: ✅ Shows 'Resend in Xs' during countdown, 'Resend OTP' after countdown
features_verified.resend_countdown_30s: ✅ Starts at 30s, decreases every second, enables button at 0
features_verified.change_number_link: ✅ Visible in verify step, resets flow to initial state
features_verified.otp_via_2factor: ✅ Real SMS sent for valid Indian numbers (confirmed in backend logs)
features_verified.photo_upload_formats: ✅ Accepts jpg, png, webp; rejects invalid formats
features_verified.photo_requires_profile: ✅ Returns 404 if profile doesn't exist (backend working)
features_verified.photo_upload_ui_state: ❌ UI doesn't enable photo upload after profile submission (frontend bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Resend OTP and Change number features fully working. Photo upload backend API works correctly. Frontend bug: after submitting profile, profileExists state is not updated, so photo upload block remains disabled. Fix needed in JoinSurgeon.jsx submitProfile() function - add setProfileExists(true) after successful submission.
